title: Custom Copilot in PowerApp
author: Shanti
text:
Is it more efficient to use Copilot or create a custom copilot to answer survey questions? How can i link PowerApp to my custom copilot? Do i need to use powerautomate to establish the logic behind answering questions
I have not built the custom copilot yet but thinking which way is more efficient
